ModuleTitle.helper: Administrator-facing title for this content block. This helps OpenContent sync with DNN module settings.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used to create #anchor-links on the page. Letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

HeroTitle.helper: Required. This becomes the main H1 for the section.

HeroLead.helper: Required. Keep this to a short paragraph for best layout results.
HeroLead.placeholder: Explore the scientific foundations and practical preparations for your journey back to the natural world.

HeroImage.helper: Required. Uploads should go to Content/Heros/. Recommended minimum size: 1200 x 1500 px. Use a strong vertical or portrait-friendly image. Keep important visual content centered, since the image may crop differently by screen size.

HeroImageAlt.helper: Optional but recommended. Describe the image for accessibility. If left blank, the Hero Title will be used.
HeroImageAlt.placeholder: Sunlit redwood trail with tall trees and a winding path
